meaning: n.投手,(家具的)轮脚,调味瓶
examples: Please reach back and pass me the pepper caster.
And what is the sun to them but a caster of shadows?
Neither Caster nor her family deserves this humiliation.
We will take whatever steps are necessary to protect Caster's right to compete without restriction.
The Johannesburg-born athlete is joined in the South Africa track and field team by Caster Semanya.
